subject: Awaiting contact
body: I am at the cafe off Cedar Square. Official is late but expected. Need immediate guidance on whether to hold or break.

subject: Traffic note: airport service road
body: Transit camera pull shows unusual convoy spacing near airport perimeter checkpoint B. No declared VIP movement in the same window.

subject: Official schedule mismatch
body: Municipal scheduler logs the Local Official at residence prep through 08:20. No public entry for Cedar Square district this morning.
